description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common EMR/practice-management visit export up with the clinic-scheduling pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers. Load de-identified records only.

value_hints.charge: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.provider: de-identify to role/name policy per your compliance rules

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Load only the fields you choose; nothing else leaves your systems. Aris answers only from the record and never infers clinical content.
